title: Gravity
why_this_song: Gravity by John Mayer (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Just keep me where the light is"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Gravity is working against me"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Just keep me where the light is"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Oh, twice as much ain't twice as good"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Gravity is working against me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "keep" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Oh, twice as much ain't twice as good

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Gravity" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Gravity" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Gravity" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Gravity", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Gravity" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Gravity" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
